user_query:
I’m preparing a 90‑minute community workshop on cleaner transportation with a focus on biodiesel. Using the files already in this workspace, please build a concrete session plan that balances attendee interests and the available lesson materials.

Requirements:
1) Inspect the materials directory and parse lesson metadata:
- Enumerate all Markdown files under materials/.
- For each file, read the first three header lines in order (exact keys):
  - Title: <string>
  - Duration: <integer minutes>
  - Tags: <comma-separated tag list>
- Use those values as the canonical metadata for planning.

2) Analyze attendee interests:
- Read data/attendees.csv.
- From the interest_tags column (semicolon-separated), compute the three most frequent tags overall. If a tie affects which tags occupy the top three, break ties alphabetically. Restrict to tags that appear in at least one materials file.

3) Plan the workshop within time constraints:
- Read configs/workshop.yaml to get max_duration_minutes (initially 90) and leave that limit unchanged.
- Select an ordered subset of lesson files whose total duration does not exceed max_duration_minutes.
- Prioritize lessons that include at least one of the top three interest tags. If multiple candidates compete for remaining time, break ties by: (a) greater overlap with top tags, then (b) shorter duration, then (c) filename alphabetical.
- Include materials/1_intro_biodiesel.md as the first segment if and only if adding it keeps the total at or under max_duration_minutes. The intro is exempt from the "must match top tags" rule; all other selected lessons must include at least one top tag.
- Do not split lessons or alter their durations.

4) Produce a structured plan and update the configuration:
- Write outputs/workshop_plan.json with the following fields:
  - max_duration_minutes: integer
  - top_interest_tags: array of exactly 3 strings
  - selected_materials: array of objects with keys {file_path, title, duration_minutes, tags}
  - total_duration_minutes: integer equal to the sum of selected durations
- Verify that every selected file path exists under materials/ and that total_duration_minutes <= max_duration_minutes.
- Modify configs/workshop.yaml by updating:
  - topic_focus: set to the computed top_interest_tags (in the order determined by frequency and tie-breaking)
  - selected_materials: set to the ordered list of the chosen lesson file paths
Leave all other keys unchanged.

Inputs:
- materials/*.md
- data/attendees.csv
- configs/workshop.yaml

Outputs to create/update:
- outputs/workshop_plan.json (new file)
- configs/workshop.yaml (modified in place)

Please keep all work local and avoid adding new external dependencies or downloading anything. All file paths are relative to the workspace directory.
